data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of preference learning affecting box contents, but there is no evidence provided that demonstrates how the system adjusts box contents based on subscriber preferences or feedback. The linked use case mentions this need, but without concrete API reads or persisted state checks to confirm this functionality, it indicates a clear gap in the requirement coverage. The prior steps do not address this specific aspect of the requirement, leading to the conclusion that the requirement is not met.
gaps: No evidence of how preference learning affects box contents based on subscriber feedback or choices.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for preference learning functionality
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that the system adjusts box contents based on user preferences and feedback.
